examples: The fleeing convicts were picked out of the darkness by the watchful prison guards
I can't make out the faces in this photograph
Please make the check out to me
I cannot make out what this politician is saying
How is she doing in her new job?

meanings.definition: kiss, embrace, or fondle with sexual passion
examples: The couple were necking in the back seat of the car

meanings.definition: write all the required information onto a form

examples: Your remarks make me out to be stupid
She made out that she know nothing about the crime
